name: Anansi Tales
teaser: Give cards to other players for benefit, gain benefits when they play or discard them, and give away actions that are continuously passed between players.
mechanics: Give cards to other players for benefit, gain benefits when they play or discard them, and give away actions that are continuously passed between players.

name: Ancient Incas
teaser: Draw, play and replay play-on-base actions that activate abilities that trigger each time you play a play-on-base action, especially on the same base.
mechanics: Draw, play and replay play-on-base actions that activate abilities that trigger each time you play a play-on-base action, especially on the same base.

name: Grimms' Fairy Tales
teaser: Play with a team of several pairs of minions who can only work when they are together with their partner.
mechanics: Play with a team of several pairs of minions who can only work when they are together with their partner.

name: Polynesian Voyagers
teaser: Move to bases where you don't already have a minion, gain power and +1 power counters from play-on-minion actions, and put additional bases into play.
mechanics: Move to bases where you don't already have a minion, gain power and +1 power counters from play-on-minion actions, and put additional bases into play.

name: Russian Fairy Tales
teaser: Replace any minions in play with other ones, usually random ones played off the top of their owner's deck.
mechanics: Replace any minions in play with other ones, usually random ones played off the top of their owner's deck.
